description: Live Cook Islands flight fares and the full Air Rarotonga route network, agent-native with offline search.

novel_features.name: Cheapest day finder
novel_features.description: Find the lowest fare per day across a date window for a route.

novel_features.name: Offline route network
novel_features.description: Full Cook Islands route graph stored locally in SQLite.

novel_features.name: Fare calendar
novel_features.description: Fares for a route across many dates, persisted for trend tracking.
